content.en:
The five Legendary Realm Lords didn't stay in the Source Sea for too long, otherwise, as soon as they saw Ye Tian, they would think of the Eternal Treasure, and they would not be able to help but make a move, and they would tear their faces with Ye Tian

Therefore, they still couldn't see their eyes and didn't feel pain, and they directly chose to leave the source sea and return to their eternal space-time territory.

However, they have sent many of their subordinates to settle in the space-time territory, and if the Source Sea continues to give birth to Eternal Arcana, they will be able to know it as soon as possible.

......

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian was studying the Eternal Treasure he had just obtained, and through refining, he learned that this Eternal Treasure was called Jialan Leaf, and in terms of power, Jialanye was much better than the Mixed Yuan Ling's Eternal Treasure, which was comparable to the Silent Void Bell.

The usefulness of Jialan Leaf is not small, it can save his life, and it can also help Ye Tian escape, which can be regarded as an eternal treasure of the auxiliary class.

This Eternal Arcana is very popular, even rarer than the offensive Eternal Arcana.

Especially when you're exploring some kind of ruin, it's especially important to stay alive.

And sometimes it's useless to have a stronger attack, and it's almost impossible to survive in the face of a desperate situation.

Jia Lanye can make Ye Tian nearly 103 particles that can protect his whole body when facing a deadly attack, this means almost makes him immortal, unless the enemy he encounters is too powerful.

Moreover, Jia Lanye can make Ye Tian turn into thousands of escapes, similar to the Void Light Means of the Fifth-Order Void Beast.The fifth-order Void Beast can turn into hundreds of millions of Void Light and escape into the depths of the Void Region, and the Legendary Realm Lord has no time to stop it.

And Jia Lanye also has such an effect, even better, faster, and doesn't even need to harm itself, and the Void Beast's Void Light is actually a means of self-harm, although it can save its life, but it costs a lot, so the fifth-order Void Beast will not use it unless it is facing a desperate situation.

So to a certain extent, Jialanye is too rebellious.

"Yes, the Mixed Yuan Order can enhance my strength, but Jia Lanye can enhance my life-saving ability, these two eternal treasures are in hand, even if the five Legendary Realm Lords of the space-time territory besiege me, I am not afraid!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition, if Ye Tian's copy body is tested in the future, with the help of Jia Lan Ye, it will not collapse easily, and it will be of greater help to Ye Tian.

"The next goal is to cultivate to the Legendary Realm Lord level as soon as possible, if you can't reach the Legendary Realm Lord realm in one day, it will be difficult to crush other Legendary Realm Lords. "

Therefore, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate, improve the degree of integration of will and body, and let his cultivation constantly approach the extreme of the nine-step immortal realm lord, once he reached the extreme of the nine-step immortal realm lord, he could go to the legendary realm lord realm.

With the help of the Mixed Yuan Order, Ye Tian is naturally getting closer and closer to the extreme of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord, and in fact, he is not too far from the extreme of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord.

For example, the degree of integration is 90% 6 to 90% 7 is a huge difficulty, and 90% 8 to 99% is also a huge difficulty.

The so-called extreme is ninety-nine-nine...

This is infinitely close to ten percent fusion, and it even looks like ten percent fusion, but there is still a trace of no fusion in the underworld, this is the ultimate of the nine-step immortal realm lord, and it is also a shackle, and even many nine-step immortal realm extreme lords can't find the last trace of unfused place, and they don't know how to impact the legendary realm lord at all

This is called bottleneck shackles!

If it is really found, then it will break the shackles and be promoted to the Legendary Realm Lord, but there are too few who can really break through.

But Ye Tian is still very confident in himself, he 100% thinks that he can break through.

In the blink of an eye, 500,000 eternal years have passed.

At this time, the degree of fusion between Ye Tian's will and body had reached more than ninety percent, and it was difficult to estimate the specific extent.

However, Ye Tian felt that he was still a little far from the peak lord of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm, because he could still continue to fuse his will and body, but it was very slow.

Finally, after another fifty thousand eternal years had passed, Ye Tian felt that his whole body had completely fused with his will, but he still hadn't broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord realm.

At this time, Ye Tian knew that he had already reached the extreme of the nine-step Immortal Realm Lord, and he was only one trace away from breaking through to the Legendary Realm Lord level.

For the next long time, Ye Tian didn't make any progress, and seemed to be stopped by a bottleneck.

But Ye Tian was not impatient at all, and each copy body was cultivating separately, preparing for the impact on the Legendary Realm Lord.

this day.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice Han discussed and communicated, and among the five Legendary Realm Lords, Ye Tian had a good relationship with Lord Ice Letter.

"Lord Binghan, how can the Immortal Realm Lord impact the Legendary Realm Lord Realm?" Ye Tian asked

Lord Binghan smiled slightly: "It seems that the Endless Lord has cultivated to the extreme of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord, and this speed simply makes me ashamed." As for how to impact the Legendary Realm Lord, each Legendary Realm Lord has a different way to break through. Some have taken some kind of Eternal Kui Treasure and thus completed a breakthrough. Some of them have gone through a long period of penance and have broken through unconsciously. As for me, I entered a spectacle, and it took me a long time to complete the last trace of fusion and break through to the Legendary Realm Lord. If I had to give advice, I wouldn't know what to say. "

"I see, thank you Lord Binghan for your advice!"

Ye Tian thanked.

After some time, Ye Tian's discussion with Lord Binghan came to an end.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating, pondering how to break through the Legendary Realm Lord.

Suddenly, he thought a little.

The Legendary Realm Lord on this side of the space-time territory, the cultivation direction is to fuse the will and the innate eternal rules, so that he can grow step by step, and finally impact the Legendary Realm Lord.

And his attainments in the fusion of will and innate eternal rules surpassed many Legendary Realm Lords.

If he forcibly fuses with his body through the power after the fusion of his will and the innate eternal rules, it is tantamount to stimulating the body, which is a forcible fusion, but it is possible to find the last trace of the body.

In that case, he would be able to break through to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm. _
